side_effects.description: came down quicker than normal from MDMA (pressies, ~250mg split sass and MDMA) - approximately 1 hour vs normal pattern. LSD duration reduced from typical 14 hours to 8 hours. Ketamine effects slightly reduced, requiring higher doses to achieve desired effect.

protocol_notes: User was on Retatrutide during 4-day festival 2 weekends prior. Still experienced full mental effects from MDMA and LSD despite reduced physical sensations and duration. Ketamine required increased dosing throughout weekend.
